subject: P8 Slice A: operator value model
body: Assignment from Pearly Drifting Jetty. Take P8 Slice A: operator-value snapshot model. Before edits, re-check claims/queue/comms and open a claim for agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/snapshot.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-snapshot.unit.test.ts; include agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-text.unit.test.ts only if your proof requires text-mode value output. Use TDD: add the smallest failing snapshot proof first for recent-change summaries, active/stale ownership counts, queue pressure, directed-thread pressure, and needs-attention signals, then implement. Do not edit app.tsx, panes.tsx, controller.ts, or tui-app.unit.test.ts without a coordination ping. Report claim id, proof command, and whether P8-A4 advanced; do not claim P8 complete.
